workingHours.lt: Darbo dienomis 08:00-20:00, sestadieniais 09:00-14:00 (tik su isankstine registracija), sekmadieniais nedirbama
workingHours.en: Weekdays 08:00-20:00, Saturdays 09:00-14:00 (by prior registration), Sundays closed

parking.lt: Prie pagrindinio iejimo yra nemokama 5 vietu automobiliu aikstele. Taip pat yra mokamu parkavimo vietu netoliese.
parking.en: There is a free 5-space parking area at the main entrance. Paid parking options are also available nearby.
